title: Statutory Functions of the Minister for Finance
title_en: Statutory Functions of the Minister for Finance

provisions.title: Absence of the Minister
provisions.content: This Order shall have effect during the absence of the Minister for Finance from Dar es Salaam and shall expire upon his return to Dar es Salaam following the publication of this Order.

provisions.title: Vest of functions
provisions.content: All the powers and functions conferred or imposed upon the Minister for Finance shall vest in and may be exercised by Saada Mkuya Salum Deputy Minister for Finance.
